notes.patches: Additional patch versions are supported per component: ESXi/vCenter/vSAN 8.0 U3x; NSX 4.2.x; Aria Operations/Logs/Orchestrator 8.18.x; Cloud Director 10.6.x; Aria Operations for Networks 6.13.x; vSphere Replication and Live Site Recovery 9.0.x. TKG 2.1.1 is also supported.
notes.5.1Mandatory: When moving to TCP 5.1, upgrading Telco Cloud Automation (including Airgap and Harbor), Tanzu Kubernetes Grid, and Avi Load Balancer is mandatory. The remaining components can stay on the versions supported in TCP 5.0 or 5.0.1 unless a specific issue fix requires the newer version.
notes.bma: Bare Metal Automation (BMA) is no longer a TCP component as of 5.1 — customers use their own third-party tooling (or other VMware solutions) for bare-metal automation instead, which is why it has no row in the 5.1 upgrade guide's component matrix (unlike every earlier target).

targetsNote: Component target versions are taken directly from the 'source and target versions of the components' matrix in each TCP Upgrade Guide (5.0.2 and 5.1). The Tanzu Kubernetes management/workload phases both target the matrix's Tanzu Kubernetes Grid row.
tcaSourcesNote: From each TCP Upgrade Guide's 'supports the following Telco Cloud Automation upgrade paths' list — independent of the TCP-source-implied TCA version (the tca matrix row above), for environments where the live TCA patch has drifted from the nominal TCP bundle.
